mapper.select:
SELECT ap.id, ap.activity_id, ap.join_time,
act.title, act.content, act.event_time, act.finish_time, act.publisher, act.created_at,
ui.NAME, ui.CODE, ui.sex, ui.images FROM activity_participants ap LEFT JOIN activityParticipants act ON (act.id = ap.activity_id) LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON (ui.id = ap.user_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND act.title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{activityParticipants.title},'%')
AND act.publisher LIKE CONCAT('%',#{activityParticipants.publisher},'%')
AND ui.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{activityParticipants.name},'%')
ORDER BY created_at DESC
